name: OpenClaw Manifest Engine
description: Replaces OpenClaw's naive transcript replay with a typed, versioned manifest system. Durable facts, bounded context, surgical recall.

manifestRootDir.description: Directory where per-session manifests are stored. Defaults to the session file's directory.

maxContextChars.description: Maximum characters in the injected operational memory block. Default: 8000.

maxFacts.description: Maximum facts injected per turn. Default: 20.

maxSummaries.description: Maximum summaries injected per turn. Default: 4.

maxWindowTokens.description: Maximum token budget for sliding window history. Default: 6000.

maxWindowTurns.description: Maximum completed turns to keep in sliding window. Default: 5.
